name: switch
description: An accessible toggle switch for instant on/off settings. Built on Radix UI.

examples.title: Basic

ai.whenToUse: Use for settings that take effect immediately: dark mode, notifications, feature toggles.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for form submissions (use Checkbox). Don't use for mutually exclusive options (use RadioGroup).
commonMistakes: Using for form fields that need explicit submit
ai.accessibilityNotes: Always pair with Label. Radix handles role='switch' and aria-checked.
